name: Christina P
bio: Christina P (Christina Pazsitzky) is an American stand-up comedian, writer, and podcast host. She co-hosts the long-running podcast Your Moms House with her husband, comedian Tom Segura, and hosts the solo podcast Where My Moms At. She has released the Netflix specials Mother Inferior (2017) and Mom Genes (2022), with material centered on parenting, marriage, and a Gen-X point of view.

timeline.ev: Co-launches the Your Moms House podcast

bits.t: Breaking the Cycle of Generational Trauma
